MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Interpleder-Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Laura Martinez.
Andrew Chew, Esq. for Plaintiff: Brayton Purcell.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Diane rose Effinger.
See scanned doc. for details of ORDER and Judgment.
